channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is 'on life support' after rejecting Tehran's counterproposal
item.description: The testy U.S.-Iran ceasefire began in mid-April after Trump threatened to destroy Iran's "whole civilization" if no deal was struck.

item.title: Trump invites Elon Musk, Tim Cook, Larry Fink and other CEOs to join China trip for Xi summit
item.description: Trump invited Tesla's Elon Musk, Apple's Tim Cook and Blackrock's Larry Fink to join his China trip for talks with Xi Jinping on trade, AI and geopolitics.

item.title: OpenAI trial: Nadella says Musk never raised concerns to him about Microsoft investment
item.description: Elon Musk named Microsoft as a defendant in his lawsuit against OpenAI

item.title: S&P 500 rises to fresh record, Micron leads Nvidia and chipmakers higher: Live updates
item.description: The three major indexes are coming off a winning weak.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Corning, Qualcomm, Wendy’s, Trade Desk & more
item.description: Here are the stocks making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Strategy just hit a new high for the year. Should you buy the comeback in bitcoin stocks?
item.description: Katie Stockton of Fairlead Strategies breaks down the charts on this crypto-tied names.

item.title: Michael Burry is not a believer: 'For any stocks going parabolic reduce positions almost entirely'
item.description: Michael Burry said investors should "reject greed" as enthusiasm around artificial intelligence and momentum-driven trades pushes valuations sharply higher.

item.title: Saudi Aramco CEO says oil market won't normalize until 2027 if Hormuz disruption persists
item.description: Oil inventories are rapidly drawing down as the Strait of Hormuz remains close, Saudi Aramco CEO Amin Nasser said.

item.title: GM cutting hundreds of salaried IT workers as it trims costs, evaluates needs
item.description: General Motors is laying off hundreds of salaried employees in its information technology operations.

item.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
item.description: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.

item.title: April home sales disappoint as higher mortgage rates weigh on buyers
item.description: Home sales barely moved in April, as mortgage rates shot higher the month before and uncertainty over the war with Iran weighed on consumers.

item.title: The wealthy keep buying Manhattan real estate despite potential pied-à-terre tax
item.description: Real estate sales in Manhattan worth $4 million or more increased in the past month, according to Olshan Realty.

item.title: Former Tesla CFO Deepak Ahuja joins EV battery recycler Redwood Materials
item.description: Before joining Redwood Materials, Ahuja served as chief financial and business officer at the drone delivery startup Zipline for about three years.

item.title: Chip stocks continue to surge. Here's how to buy one for less
item.description: The immediate impulse might be to jump in the chip rally. If you're in that camp, a more measured approach might be to use options and risk less capital.

item.title: Cisco could see a nearly 25% post-earnings boost over the next quarter, pro trader says
item.description: Jay Woods reviews Cisco, a key company reporting earnings this week, and why traders will be dissecting this week's CPI and PPI data.

item.title: Netflix sued by Texas for allegedly spying on children, addicting users
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton accused Netflix of spying on children and other consumers by collecting their data without consent, and designing its platform to be addictive.

item.title: ‘The haters will hate’: Dan Ives predicts Nasdaq 30,000 as AI rally expands
item.description: A solid tech earnings season has seen investor jitters earlier this year evaporate

item.title: Hantavirus cases spark brief surge in pharma and biotech stocks — here’s why trading is so volatile
item.description: The outbreak of Hantavirus on a cruise ship has led to biotech and pharmaceutical stocks surging on reports of firms developing vaccines.

item.title: Cerebras bumps up IPO range as it looks to raise up to $4.8 billion
item.description: Elon Musk was open to having OpenAI merge with Cerebras. Now Cerebras is looking at going public as soon as this week.

item.title: Hassett says AI isn't costing anybody their job right now — but tech layoffs keep coming
item.description: Tech companies have continued to announce layoffs tied to AI, including recent cuts from Amazon, Meta and Oracle.

item.title: Jim Cramer's approach to rallying AI stocks, plus updates on our breakup plays
item.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is in June. Get a $150 Amazon gift card and extra rewards with the right credit card
item.description: Amazon Prime Day is coming early this year; it's time to prepare. We explain when the sale is actually worth it and the right cards to use for added perks.

item.title: IRS may owe millions of taxpayers refunds for pandemic-era penalty relief. How to file a claim
item.description: Millions of Americans could be eligible for pandemic-era tax refunds based on Kwong v. United States ruling. Here's the deadline and who qualifies.

item.title: Cole Allen pleads not guilty to trying to assassinate Trump
item.description: Allen is accused of trying to kill Trump, transporting firearms interstate, discharging a firearm during an act of violence and assaulting law enforcement.

item.title: High gas prices are hurting restaurant sales — but not all chains
item.description: Restaurant traffic fell 2.3% in March compared with the year-ago period, according to Black Box Intelligence.

item.title: Congress and retailers want to rebuild national parks. Tolls on federal roads might pay for it
item.description: Rebuilding national parks is a bipartisan priority and key for outdoor recreation companies such as REI and VF Corp.

item.title: Traders are treating this legacy tech giant like the next 'meme' stock
item.description: Options traders might have found a new big tech favorite ahead of this week's earnings.

item.title: Micron shares are rising again despite weak overall market. Why memory chip rally seems unstoppable
item.description: Micron is among the "most hyped stocks on social media" as retail enthusiasm simmers

item.title: Circle raises $222 million from BlackRock, Apollo and others in Arc token presale valued at $3 billion
item.description: Andreessen Horowitz served as the lead investor in the sale with a $75 million investment. Other investors include BlackRock and Apollo Funds.

item.title: Social Security claims at 62 get social media buzz — experts say proceed with caution
item.description: This measure for claiming Social Security retirement benefits may encourage people to start benefits at 62. But experts say to proceed with caution.
